create_columns.name: gen_annotation_link
create_columns.command: CONCAT('Annotation','|','https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/amr_portal/genomes/', IF(STARTS_WITH(assembly_id, 'ERZ'), concat_ws('/', assembly_ID[0:3], assembly_id[4:6], assembly_ID[7:9], assembly_id), CONCAT_WS('/', assembly_ID[0:3], assembly_ID[5:7], assembly_ID[8:10], assembly_ID)))

create_columns.name: gen_annotation_link
create_columns.command: CONCAT('Annotation','|','https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/amr_portal/genomes/', IF(STARTS_WITH(assembly_id, 'ERZ'), concat_ws('/', assembly_ID[0:3], assembly_id[4:6], assembly_ID[7:9], assembly_id), CONCAT_WS('/', assembly_ID[0:3], assembly_ID[5:7], assembly_ID[8:10], assembly_ID)))
